topic: Building a Robust Event-Driven Architecture in Laravel
focus: Decoupling systems using Laravel events and listeners, handling high-volume background tasks, avoiding tight coupling, and event sourcing patterns

topic: Mastering Database Indexing and Query Optimization for Large Datasets
focus: Composite indexes, analyzing slow queries with EXPLAIN, covering indexes, partial indexes, and when to denormalize for performance

topic: Implementing Idempotency in Payment Webhooks using Redis
focus: Preventing duplicate webhook processing with Redis locks and idempotency keys, exactly-once semantics, and safe retry strategies

topic: Zero-Downtime Deployments with Laravel Envoy and CI/CD
focus: Symlink-based deployment, database migration safety during deploys, blue-green deployments, and CI/CD pipeline automation

topic: Demystifying the Node.js Event Loop for Backend Engineers
focus: libuv internals, phases of the event loop, blocking vs non-blocking operations, and practical patterns to avoid event loop starvation

topic: Effective Background Job Processing at Scale
focus: Job rate limiting, exponential backoff, dead-letter queues, worker autoscaling, and monitoring queue health in production
Redis Pub/Sub for cross-node broadcasting, horizontal scaling of WebSocket servers, memory optimization, and load balancing sticky sessions

topic: API Rate Limiting Strategies in Laravel for Production
focus: Token bucket vs sliding window algorithms, per-user and per-IP throttling, Redis-backed rate limiters, and graceful 429 responses

topic: Building a Custom Authorization System Beyond Laravel Gates
focus: RBAC vs ABAC, dynamic permissions, policy caching, row-level security, and multi-tenant permission isolation

topic: Mastering Laravel Service Container and Dependency Injection
focus: Binding interfaces, contextual binding, tagged services, lazy resolution, and designing testable service classes
